backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (header, hero, services, footer) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana SPA, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering Header, HeroSection, ServicesSection, and Footer in sequence.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Dark slate-900 footer with three columns for logo/tagline, quick links with smooth scroll, and contact details (email, phone, address), plus a dynamic copyright year and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header featuring the foundation logo, smooth-scroll desktop nav links, a clickable orange phone number, an orange rounded-pill Register button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-width hero section with an orange-to-white gradient, badge, bold headline, supporting paragraph, Apply Now and Call Now CTA buttons, stat counters, and a hero community image with a floating trust badge.
Services section rendering four welfare program cards (Free Healthcare, Quality Education, Farmer Welfare, Employment Mission) in a responsive grid with orange icons, hover border highlight, and icon scale animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Hind, Poppins), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values with a saffron-orange brand color.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (OKLCH-based), typography, border radii, font families (Hind/Poppins), and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a Hindi-language NGO landing page (Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana) with its architectural notes, existing features, image requirements, and build history.
